Class epp.NotFound 

java.lang.Object
   |
   +----java.lang.Throwable
           |
           +----java.lang.Exception
                   |
                   +----epp.NotFound
public class NotFound
extends Exception
The NotFound class is an exception that will be thrown when a variable environment is not found to retrieve information such as the type of a variable.

NotFound()

NotFound 
 public NotFound()
